popularStory.headline: Charles V le Sage
popularStory.description: Charles V, dit « Charles le Sage » (21 janvier 1338 - Vincennes, 16 septembre 1380 - Beauté-sur-Marne), est roi de France de 1364 à 1380. Son règne marque la fin de la première partie de la guerre de …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France於1338年1月21日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內文斯時，他的父親Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France18歲，母親Bonne de Luxembourg22歲。他於1350年4月8日與Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France在法國o-阿爾培斯o萊昂結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。他去世於1380年9月16日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內諾根吉素-馬內享年42歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France于1338年1月21日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內文斯时，他的父亲Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France18岁，母亲Bonne de Luxembourg22岁。他于1350年4月8日与Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France在法国o-阿爾培斯o萊昂结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。他去世于1380年9月16日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-德-馬內諾根吉素-馬內享年42岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Valois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Henri, Normand, Alcide, Armand, Emilien, Gilberte, Gilles, Herve, Jacques, Lucien.
habitational name from (Le) Valois, the name of a few places in France, e.g. in Forez and Limousin.

nameMeanings.name: Charles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic word, karl, meaning ‘free man’, akin to Old English ceorl ‘man’. The name, Latin form Carolus, owed its popularity in medieval Europe to the Frankish leader Charlemagne ( ?742–814 ), who in 800 established himself as Holy Roman Emperor. His name (Latin Carolus Magnus) means ‘Charles the Great’. Carolus—or Karl, the German form—was a common name among Frankish leaders, including Charlemagne's grandfather Charles Martel ( 688–741 ). Charles is the French form. The name occurs occasionally in medieval Britain as Karolus or Carolus; it had a certain vogue in West Yorkshire from the 1400s, particularly among gentry families. The form Charles was chosen by Mary Queen of Scots ( 1542–87 ), who had been brought up in France, for her son, Charles James ( 1566–1625 ), who became King James VI of Scotland and, from 1603 , James I of England. His son and grandson both reigned as King Charles , and the name thus became established in the 17th century both in the Stuart royal house and among English and Scottish supporters of the Stuart monarchy. In the 18th century it was to some extent favoured, along with James , by Jacobites, supporters of the exiled Stuarts, opposed to the Hanoverian monarchy, especially in the Highlands of Scotland. In the 19th century the popularity of the name was further enhanced by romanticization of the story of ‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’, leader of the 1745 rebellion.

nameMeanings.name: "Le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

nameMeanings.name: Sage"
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mainly U.S.: apparently from the name of the herb (Middle English sauge, via Old French from Latin salvia); compare Sorrel and Bay . In part it may also have been taken from the vocabulary word meaning ‘wise’ (from Latin sapius).

en.lifeSummary: When Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France was born on 21 January 1338, in Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, his father, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, was 18 and his mother, Bonne de Luxembourg, was 22. He married Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France on 8 April 1350, in Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. He died on 16 September 1380, in Nogent-sur-Marne, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 42, and was buried in Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France est né le 21 janvier 1338, à Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, son père, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Bonne de Luxembourg, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France le 8 avril 1350, à Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1380, à Nogent-sur-Marne, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France am 21. Januar 1338 in Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France 18 und seine Mutter Bonne de Luxembourg 22. Er hat am 8. April 1350 in Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb am 16. September 1380 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Nogent-sur-Marne, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France è nato il il 21 gennaio 1338 nel Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Bonne de Luxembourg, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France il 8 aprile 1350, nel Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 16 settembre 1380, nel Nogent-sur-Marne, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de Franceが1338年1月21日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-デ-マルンヴィンセンスで生まれた時，父Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de Franceは18歳，母Bonne de Luxembourgは22歳であった。1350年4月8日にフランスルhoネ-アルペスルhoンリオンでJeanne de Bourbon Reine de Franceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼は1380年9月16日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-デ-マルンノジェント-スル-マルンで42歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-サイント-デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France(이)가 1338년 1월 21일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-데-마니 빈스네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Bonne de Luxembourg(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1350년 4월 8일 프랑스 ho니-알프스 ho니 리에서 Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1380년 9월 16일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-데-마니 노전트-수-마니에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

mn.21 January 1338–16.09.1380: 1338 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 21–1380 оны Есдүгээр сарын 16

pt.21 January 1338–16.09.1380: 21 de janeiro de 1338–16 de setembro de 1380
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France nasceu em 21 de janeiro de 1338, em Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Bonne de Luxembourg, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France em 8 de abril de 1350, em Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1380, em Nogent-sur-Marne, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, França, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France родился 21 января 1338 г. в местности винценнесь, вал-де-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Bonne de Luxembourg, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France 8 апреля 1350 г. в местности лен, рoн, рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Он умер 16 сентября 1380 г. в местности ноджент-сур-марн, вал-де-марн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

sm.from 1355 to 1364: mai le 1355 e o'o I le 1364

es.21 January 1338–16.09.1380: 21 de enero de 1338–16 de septiembre de 1380
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Charles V "Le Sage" de Valois Roi de France nació el 21 de enero de 1338, en Vincennes, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Jean II "Le Bon" de France Roi de France, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Bonne de Luxembourg, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Bourbon Reine de France el 8 de abril de 1350, en Lyon, Rhône, Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1380, en Nogent-sur-Marne, Val-de-Marne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.
